posts.text:
PRESIDENT TRUMP ON IRAN:

“We took a little excursion because we felt we had to do that to get rid of some evil. I think you'll see it's going to be a short-term excursion. Short term!”
posts.author: KobeissiLetter

posts.text:
Enjoying “Primal Intelligence” by Angus Fletcher 

It’s about detecting the extraordinary exceptions and the focusing on them to flush out the opportunity. 

“The more exceptional the exception the harder it is to see”

The more upside there will be from investing in it.

Major step to success, “replacing fast judgment with slow inquiry” 

Prompt your brain as to the source of the rushed judgment… then go deeper.  

Develop the habit of intuitively sensing there’s reason to not just quickly and assume the status quo but sniff out extraordinary opportunities and then capitalize on them. 

Develop your narrative ability to see the extraordinary stories we want to be a part of.  The ones that lead to a future that we want to live in.
posts.author: BambroughKevin
